name: semantic-junkyard
description: Agent-native semantic discovery platform for turning unstructured data into navigable vector and graph structures.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -k -n API,WEB,POC -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/poc"
scripts.dev:product: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:poc: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -k -n API,POC -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/poc"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/mcp && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/poc
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/mcp && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/poc
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.poc:agent:mcp: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/mcp && npm run poc:agent:mcp -w apps/mcp
